title: bulbophyllum calyptratum
intro: Bulbophyllum calyptratum, also known as the helmet orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical regions of Africa and Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Bulbophyllum calyptratum are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. This plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Bulbophyllum calyptratum is often used in decoctions, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various ailments.
